LISTS.EMPTY_SUB: Tap + to create one, or the import button to receive from another device.
LISTS.IMPORT_SHOW_HINT: Ask the sender to open their list's Settings tab and scan this code.
LISTS.IMPORT_SHOW_WAITING: Waiting — the list will open automatically once received.
LISTS.IMPORT_SCAN_HINT: Scan the QR code shown on the sender's Export screen.
LISTS.IMPORT_SCAN_WAITING: QR scanned — waiting for key delivery…
LISTS.IMPORT_SCAN_ERROR: Could not read QR code. Make sure you're scanning an export QR.
LISTS.EXPORT_QR_HINT: The other device taps "Import list" → "Scan QR" and points the camera here.
LISTS.EXPORT_QR_WAITING: Waiting — will complete automatically once scanned.
LISTS.EXPORT_DONE: ✓ List exported — the other device will open it automatically.
LISTS.ERROR_LIST_FULL: This list has reached its limit of 30 members and can't accept new devices.
LISTS.REVEAL_HINT: Enter your master password to show sensitive lists on this device.

CHAT.NAME_DIALOG_HINT: Used as your sender name in chat. Stored only on this device.

LIST_DETAIL.CHAT_VIEW_TOGGLE_ARIA: Switch between chat, Lethe, and Charon
LIST_DETAIL.SOLO_HINT: Chat, Lethe, and Charon unlock once someone else joins this list.

WHISPER.PRESENCE_EMPTY: No one else is watching right now
WHISPER.HINT: Messages here are never saved — they appear briefly on every connected device, then disappear.

CHARON.HINT: Send a photo or file that disappears once everyone has opened it.
CHARON.REVEAL_ARIA: Open this drop (it will burn after viewing)
CHARON.REVEAL_CONFIRM: This can only be opened once. After you open it, it's gone for good. Open it now?
CHARON.RECALL_ARIA: Delete this drop before it's opened
CHARON.RECALL_CONFIRM: Delete this drop for everyone before it's opened?
CHARON.BURNED_NOTICE: Burned — this can't be opened again.

LIST_SETTINGS.LIST_NAME_HINT: This name is local — only visible on this device.
LIST_SETTINGS.AUTO_DELETE_HINT: Checked items are removed after this duration.
LIST_SETTINGS.NOTIFICATIONS_HINT: Control which push notifications this device receives for this list.
LIST_SETTINGS.NOTIFY_ON_MESSAGE_HINT: Notify when someone sends a message in this list's chat.
LIST_SETTINGS.NOTIFY_ON_ITEMS_CHANGED_HINT: Notify when items are added, checked, or removed.
LIST_SETTINGS.PRIVACY_HINT: Control how this list is shown on this device.
LIST_SETTINGS.SENSITIVE_HINT: This list is hidden by default. To show it, tap the ghost logo three times and enter your master password.
LIST_SETTINGS.SENSITIVE_NO_PASSWORD: Set a master password in general settings first to mark lists as sensitive.
LIST_SETTINGS.SHARE_LINK_HINT: Copy a link and send it via any channel.
LIST_SETTINGS.QR_HINT: Or: the other device taps "Import list" and shows a QR code — point your camera at it.
LIST_SETTINGS.QR_SENT: ✓ Key sent — the other device will open the list automatically.
LIST_SETTINGS.QR_ERROR: Could not read QR code. Make sure you're scanning the correct screen.
LIST_SETTINGS.MEMBERS_HINT: Devices that have joined this list. When a device forgets the list, it disappears from here.
LIST_SETTINGS.KICK_CONFIRM: Remove this device from the list?
LIST_SETTINGS.CONFIRM_DELETE: Delete this list for everyone? This cannot be undone.
LIST_SETTINGS.CONFIRM_FORGET: Remove this list from this device?

JOIN.TITLE: Import list
JOIN.INVITED_HINT: Give this list a name on your device, then tap Import.
JOIN.ERROR_LIST_FULL: This list has reached its limit of 30 members and can't accept new devices.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SYNC_HINT: Transfer all your lists to another device in one go.
SETTINGS.SYNC_RECEIVE_HINT: On the other device: open the link or scan the QR code — lists are transferred automatically.
SETTINGS.SYNC_SEND_HINT: On the other device, go to Settings → Sync Machine → Receive and show the QR code.
SETTINGS.SYNC_SEND_DONE: Done! All lists have been sent.
SETTINGS.SYNC_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

SECURITY.TITLE: Security
SECURITY.HINT: Lock the app with biometrics (Face ID, fingerprint). Only you can open it — the server never knows.
SECURITY.UNSUPPORTED: Biometrics are not supported on this device.
SECURITY.ENABLE_ERROR: Failed to enable. Please try again.

MASTER_PASSWORD.TITLE: Master password
MASTER_PASSWORD.HINT: Protects lists marked as sensitive. Required to show them after tapping the ghost logo three times.
MASTER_PASSWORD.REMOVE_HINT: Removing it will unhide all lists marked as sensitive on this device.
MASTER_PASSWORD.ERROR_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 4 characters long.

SETTINGS.SYNC_SEND_CHOOSE_HINT: How do you want to connect?
SETTINGS.SYNC_SEND_QR_HINT: On the other device: Settings → Sync Machine → Receive → scan QR code.
SETTINGS.SYNC_REQUIRES_BIOMETRIC: Enable biometric lock (above) to use Sync Machine.

SECURITY.LOCK_HINT: Please authenticate with biometrics to continue.

ABOUT.TITLE: About
ABOUT.WHAT_TEXT: Ghost List is an end-to-end encrypted shared list app. You create lists, add items, chat with people you share with — and none of it is readable by anyone but you and the people you invite. Not even the server.
ABOUT.FEATURE_ENCRYPTION_DESC: Every item, message and list name is encrypted on your device before it ever leaves. The server stores only ciphertext.
ABOUT.FEATURE_QR_DESC: Sharing uses ECDH P-256 key agreement. The encryption key travels only via QR code or link fragment — never through the server.
ABOUT.FEATURE_REALTIME_DESC: Changes appear instantly on every connected device via SignalR — all still encrypted end-to-end.
ABOUT.FEATURE_ZERO_DESC: No accounts, no tracking, no ads. The server can't read your data. Your keys never leave your device.
ABOUT.FEATURE_LETHE_DESC: Short wisp messages appear live on every device and vanish again without being stored – including a presence indicator showing who's watching.
ABOUT.FEATURE_CHARON_DESC: Share photos and files up to 8 MB that burn automatically after opening, or recall them before they're viewed.
ABOUT.FEATURE_PUSH_DESC: Get notified per list about new chat messages or changes to items.
ABOUT.FEATURE_HIDDEN_DESC: Mark lists as sensitive to keep them hidden – visible only after three taps on the logo and your master password.
ABOUT.BUILT_TEXT: Angular 22 · .NET 10 · PostgreSQL · SignalR · Web Crypto API · Capacitor
ABOUT.ANDROID_TEXT: Download Ghost List as an Android app — for the full native experience including push notifications.

SYNC_SEND.TITLE: Send lists
SYNC_SEND.CONFIRM_HINT: {{count}} list(s) will be sent to the other device.
SYNC_SEND.DONE_HINT: All lists transferred. The other device will import them automatically.
SYNC_SEND.ERROR_NO_LISTS: You have no lists to send.
SYNC_SEND.ERROR_FAILED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

SYNC_RECEIVE_PAGE.TITLE: Receive lists
SYNC_RECEIVE_PAGE.ERROR_HINT: Something went wrong. Please try again.
